stemHtml: ILS ground installations are issued with category ratings. A Cat II installation provides guidance to which of the following limits?

options.a: Guidance from edge of range down to the ground, and along the runway after touchdown.
options.b: Guidance from the edge of range until 50 ft above the horizontal surface at the threshold.
options.c: Guidance from the edge of range until 200 ft above the horizontal surface at the threshold.
options.d: Guidance from the edge of range until 100 ft above the horizontal surface at the threshold.
